qrScanDescription: Capture a screen or upload an image containing a TOTP QR code.
qrScreenCaptureNote: Select only the screen or tab that shows the QR code. Other content may be captured.
qrNotFound: No QR code found in the image.
qrNotTotp: The QR code does not contain a valid TOTP URI.
qrImageTooLarge: Image is too large. Maximum size is 4096×4096 pixels.
